backend/main.mo: Main actor for the BonsaiNFT canister implementing access control, user profiles, address book management, NFT minting/transfer/burn/redemption, transaction history, leaderboard, and blob storage via mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old NFT data structures (with non-optional discountCode) into new structures (with optional discountCode and separated public metadata) for canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features — fixing the provenance detail view and restricting discount code visibility to redemption-only — to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and key implementation details.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Bonsai NFT dApp, setting up the root div, meta/OG/Twitter tags, and using Video.gif as the favicon and social preview image.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages view routing between home, admin, user dashboard, and trophy room, handles authentication state, and conditionally renders the profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AddressBookModal: Modal dialog for managing an address book of Principal IDs with add, edit, delete, copy, and select-for-transfer functionality using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/AmbientSound.tsx: React component that uses the Web Audio API to generate procedural cyberpunk-style ambient music with bass, atmospheric pads, and pulse layers, toggled via a mute/unmute button.
frontend/src/components/FireBackground.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a 'Powered by T3kNo-Logic RWA Technology' tagline with a flickering flame icon.
Canvas-based animated background component that renders floating spark/ember particles and scrolling molten metal flow effects at configurable intensity levels.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with Internet Identity login/logout, role-based navigation links (home, user, admin, trophy), theme toggle, ambient sound control, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NFTDetailModal.t: Modal dialog that displays detailed information about a single NFT including its image, metadata, status badges, and a scrollable transaction history fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileEditModal: Modal form for editing a user profile (display name, bio, forge theme, and avatar image upload) that reads the current profile and saves changes via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: One-time setup modal that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter a display name to initialize their profile, blocking dismissal until submission.
frontend/src/components/RedemptionConfir: A modal dialog that displays a redeemed NFT's discount code with copy-to-clipboard functionality, showing NFT name, product, redemption timestamp, and a burn warning.
frontend/src/components/SVGBonsaiLayer.t: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/SVGForgeLayer.ts: A decorative SVG background component with two variants ('hero' and 'subtle') that renders animated forge-themed glows, molten streams, and an anvil silhouette.
frontend/src/components/TransparencyDash: A modal dashboard that displays NFT transaction history (mint, transfer, burn) for either the current user or all users in admin mode, using sorted transaction cards with icons and badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, access control, NFT data, redemptions, and transaction history, with media asset URL helpers and toast error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives, defines a forge-themed design system with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes, and includes custom keyframe animations like flicker, ember-float, gold-pulse, and shimmer-wave.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page providing UI for minting single and batch NFTs, transferring NFTs, toggling leaderboard visibility, and viewing all transaction history, with file upload support and ORIGYN metadata fields.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with a video background, hero section featuring a Bonsai NFT image, and a 'How It Works' feature grid; handles Internet Identity login and navigates authenticated users to their dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/TrophyRoom.tsx: 3D trophy room page built with React Three Fiber that displays the user's NFTs on interactive rotating pedestals with glow shaders and ember particle effects, opening a detail modal on selection.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: User-facing dashboard showing owned NFTs, redemption history, and leaderboard; supports burning NFTs to reveal discount codes, transferring NFTs to other principals, and viewing NFT details via modals.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the BonsaiNFT Forge project at version 3, documenting two active fix requests: reliably opening the provenance detail panel on NFT selection, and restricting discount code visibility to the redemption moment only.
